name: forge-frontend
description: Build the Forge workflow graph viewer — a real-time DAG visualization using Rust, WASM, and vanilla JS. Replicates the existing graph.html as a proper frontend app.

jobs.title: Project scaffold with complete HTML/CSS shell and JS module stubs
jobs.body:
Create the full project structure so all subsequent feature tickets can work on their own files in parallel without merge conflicts.

**Project files:**
- `Cargo.toml` — lib crate with wasm-bindgen, serde, serde_json, serde-wasm-bindgen, js-sys, web-sys (features: EventSource, EventTarget, MessageEvent, Event, console)
- `package.json` — build script: `wasm-pack build --target web --out-dir pkg`
- `.gitignore` — include `pkg/`, `target/`, `node_modules/`
- `src/lib.rs` — minimal: just `greet()` function with `#[wasm_bindgen]`

**`index.html`** — Complete, final HTML file. Not modified by any later ticket. Contains:
- URL constants at top: `SIDECAR_URL` (default `http://localhost:8080`), `FORGEJO_URL` (default `http://localhost:3000`), `FORGEJO_TOKEN` (empty string)
- Fetch wrapper: intercepts `window.fetch` to inject `Authorization: token` header for FORGEJO_URL requests
- All `<script type="module">` imports for every JS module (graph.js, widgets.js, detail-panel.js, journal-panel.js, new-issue-panel.js, repo-selector.js, roster-bar.js, types.js)
- WASM init + `connect_to_events(SIDECAR_URL + '/events', onSnapshot, onUpdate)` wiring
- `onSnapshot` callback: calls `get_jobs()`, `get_workers()`, `get_sessions()`, `get_journal()`, then calls each module's sync/update function
- `onUpdate` callback: dispatches by event type to the appropriate module function
- `_filteredJobs(allJobs)` helper using `getSelectedRepo()` from repo-selector
- `_parseRepoCtx()` returning `{ owner, repo, baseUrl: FORGEJO_URL }`
- Default owner/repo: `sysadmin/workflow-test` when path segments are empty
- Full HTML structure: header bar (glassmorphism, title, repo selector slot, new issue button, legend slot), graph area (#cy canvas + #node-widgets overlay), roster bar slot, side panel slots (detail=right 360px, journal=left 400px, new-issue=right 420px)

**`style.css`** — Complete, final CSS. Not modified by any later ticket. Contains:
- Dark theme base: `#0a0e17` bg, `#c8ccd4` text, system-ui font
- Glassmorphism: header `rgba(10,14,23,0.85)` blur(12px), panels `rgba(14,18,28,0.92)` blur(16px)
- Layout: header fixed top z-100, roster bar below header z-99, graph area full viewport, panels slide-in overlays
- Panel animations: `transform: translateX(100%)` → `translateX(0)` for right panels, `translateX(-100%)` for left
- Node widget card styles: 240px wide, state-colored bg at 12% opacity, 8px border-radius
- Roster avatar styles: 34px circles, border colors for states, hover glow
- Badge styles, pill styles, scrollbar styles, focus states, transitions
- State color CSS variables matching the JS STATE_COLORS map
- All empty states, loading states, responsive wrapping

**JS module stubs** — Each file exports no-op functions matching the API that index.html calls. Later tickets fill in the implementations.

`types.js`:
```js
export const STATE_COLORS = { on_deck: '#2ecc71', blocked: '#e4a84a', on_the_stack: '#3498db', needs_help: '#f97316', in_review: '#8b5cf6', changes_requested: '#f59e0b', done: '#4a6356', failed: '#e74c3c', revoked: '#6b7280', on_ice: '#636e7d' };
```

`graph.js` — exports: `initGraph(container, { onNodeClick })`, `syncGraph(jobs)`, `highlightNode(id)`, `clearHighlights()`, `navigateToNode(id)`

`widgets.js` — exports: `syncWidgets(jobs, sessions)`, `updateWidgetSessions(sessions)`, `updateEscalatedJobs(set)`

`detail-panel.js` — exports: `initDetailPanel(opts)`, `openDetailPanel(job, allJobs, ctx)`, `closeDetailPanel()`, `fetchLinkedPR(job, ctx)`, `updatePanelSessions(sessions)`, `notifySessionUpdate(data)`

`journal-panel.js` — exports: `initJournalPanel()`, `setJournalEntries(entries)`, `prependJournalEntry(entry)`, `openJournalPanel()`, `closeJournalPanel()`

`new-issue-panel.js` — exports: `initNewIssuePanel(ctx)`, `openNewIssuePanel()`, `closeNewIssuePanel()`

`repo-selector.js` — exports: `initRepoSelector({ onRepoChange })`, `updateRepoSelector(allJobs)`, `getSelectedRepo()`

`roster-bar.js` — exports: `initRosterBar(opts)`, `updateRosterState(workers, allJobs)`, `syncRoster(workers, jobs)`, `highlightPinnedWorker(workerId)`, `getPinnedWorker()`

Each stub function should `console.log` its name when called so progress is visible during development.

**Verify:** Page loads, shows header + empty graph area, WASM `greet()` works from console, no JS errors.

jobs.title: WASM types: Job, Worker, Session, JournalEntry, ActivityEntry
jobs.body:
**File: `src/lib.rs`** — Replace the stub with full type definitions. These MUST match the sidecar's SSE payload format exactly.

**JobState enum** — `#[serde(rename_all = "snake_case")]`:
- OnIce, Blocked, OnDeck, OnTheStack, NeedsHelp, InReview, ChangesRequested, Done, Failed, Revoked
- Add `color()` method returning hex strings matching STATE_COLORS in types.js

**Job struct** — all fields from the sidecar SSE payload:
- `repo_owner: String`, `repo_name: String`, `number: u64`, `title: String`, `state: JobState`
- `priority: u32`, `assignees: Vec<String>`, `dependency_numbers: Vec<u64>`
- `activities: Vec<ActivityEntry>`, `capabilities: Vec<String>`
- `max_retries: u32`, `retry_attempt: u32`, `is_rework: bool`
- `worker_type: Option<String>`, `platform: Vec<String>`, `review: String`
- `timeout_secs: Option<u64>`
- Use `#[serde(default)]` on Vec, Option, and bool fields

**ActivityEntry** — `#[serde(tag = "kind", rename_all = "snake_case")]`:
- `InteractiveSession { session_id: String, worker_id: String, status: String, started_at: String, #[serde(default)] ended_at: Option<String>, #[serde(default)] recording_key: Option<String> }`
- `ActionRun { run_id: u64, workflow: String, worker_id: String, status: String, started_at: String, #[serde(default)] ended_at: Option<String> }`
- `Review { review_id: String, status: String, started_at: String, #[serde(default)] ended_at: Option<String>, #[serde(default)] decision: Option<String>, #[serde(default)] run_id: Option<u64> }`

**WorkerInfo** — `worker_id: String`, `state: String`, `capabilities: Vec<String>`, `worker_type: String`, `platform: Vec<String>`, `current_job_key: Option<String>`, `current_job_priority: Option<u32>`, `last_seen: String`

**SessionInfo** — `job_key: String`, `worker_id: String`, `session_url: String`, `session_name: String`, `started_at: String`, `mode: String`

**JournalEntry** — `timestamp: String`, `action: String`, `#[serde(default)] comment: Option<String>`, `#[serde(default)] job_key: Option<String>`, `#[serde(default)] worker_id: Option<String>`

All types: `#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]`, convertible to/from JsValue via serde-wasm-bindgen.

Keep the existing `greet()` function.

**Verify:** `wasm-pack build --target web --out-dir pkg` succeeds, `cargo fmt --check` and `cargo clippy` pass.

jobs.title: SSE client: connect to /events, parse snapshot + incremental updates
jobs.body:
**File: `src/lib.rs`** — Add SSE connection and state management to the existing types.

Implement:
- `connect_to_events(url, on_snapshot, on_update)` — `#[wasm_bindgen]` function
- Uses browser `EventSource` API via `web-sys`
- Parses `snapshot` event → `SnapshotPayload { jobs: Vec<Job>, workers: Vec<WorkerInfo>, sessions: Vec<SessionInfo>, journal: Vec<JournalEntry> }`
- Parses incremental events: `job_update`, `worker_update`, `worker_removed`, `journal_entry`, `session_update`, `session_removed`
- Thread-local state store: `jobs: Vec<Job>`, `workers: HashMap<String, WorkerInfo>`, `sessions: HashMap<String, SessionInfo>`, `journal: Vec<JournalEntry>`
- On snapshot: replace all state, call JS `on_snapshot()` callback
- On incremental: upsert/remove from state, call JS `on_update(event_type, data)` callback
- Store EventSource in thread-local to prevent GC

**IMPORTANT:** Log parse errors to `web_sys::console::error_1` — do NOT silently swallow `serde_json` failures. This is critical for debugging type mismatches.

Exported WASM accessors:
- `get_jobs() -> JsValue` (returns JS array of all jobs)
- `get_workers() -> JsValue` (returns JS array of all workers)
- `get_sessions() -> JsValue` (returns JS array of all sessions)
- `get_journal() -> JsValue` (returns JS array of journal entries)

**Verify:** Open page, console shows `[SSE] snapshot received` with job/worker counts. No parse errors.

jobs.title: Cytoscape.js DAG rendering
jobs.body:
**File: `graph.js`** — Replace stubs with full implementation. Do NOT modify any other file.

Implement all exported functions:
- `initGraph(container, { onNodeClick })` — Initialize Cytoscape.js + dagre layout
- `syncGraph(jobs)` — Sync graph nodes/edges with job list, detect structural vs data-only changes
- `highlightNode(id)` — Highlight node + neighbors, dim others
- `clearHighlights()` — Restore full opacity
- `navigateToNode(id)` — Animate viewport to center on node at zoom 1.5x

**Cytoscape config:**
- Load Cytoscape.js + cytoscape-dagre from CDN (add `<script>` tags or dynamic import)
- Invisible node rectangles (240x90px) — widgets overlay these
- Directed edges for dependencies (dep → job)
- Dagre layout: LR direction, nodeSep=40, rankSep=60, edgeSep=20
- Edge style: taxi routing, rightward, dim gray `rgba(255,255,255,0.15)`, 1.5px
- Zoom: min 0.15, max 3.0, wheel sensitivity 0.3

**Structural vs data-only updates:**
- Compare existing node IDs vs new job numbers
- Structural: add/remove nodes, rebuild edges, re-run dagre layout (300ms animation), preserve viewport
- Data-only: update node data in place, no re-layout

**Verify:** Graph renders with correct layout, edges show dependencies, zoom/pan works.

jobs.title: HTML node widget cards
jobs.body:
**File: `widgets.js`** — Replace stubs with full implementation. Do NOT modify any other file.

Implement all exported functions:
- `syncWidgets(jobs, sessions)` — Create/update/remove HTML cards positioned over Cytoscape nodes
- `updateWidgetSessions(sessions)` — Update session-related content in widgets
- `updateEscalatedJobs(set)` — Show/hide escalation indicators

**Positioning:**
- Absolute divs in `#node-widgets` container, `pointer-events: auto`
- Position via `transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(zoom)` using Cytoscape node positions
- Formula: `x = nodePos.x * zoom + pan.x`, `y = nodePos.y * zoom + pan.y`
- Recalculate on Cytoscape `pan`/`zoom` events — access Cytoscape instance via `window.__cy`

**Card content (240px wide):**
- Header: `#N` (11px gray) + state badge (color pill, 9px uppercase, snake_case state names)
- Title: single line, ellipsis truncation, 11px
- Links row: issue link, activity pills, PR link, session link (contextual)
- Background: state color at 12% opacity, 1px border at 20% opacity, 8px radius

**Content diffing:** Only update innerHTML when HTML string changes (`el._lastHtml` comparison).

**Cleanup:** Remove DOM elements for jobs no longer in the filtered set.

**Click handler:** On widget click (not on `<a>` or `<button>`), call `window.__onNodeClick(job)` — this is wired by index.html to trigger graph highlight + detail panel.

**Verify:** Cards appear over graph nodes, styled correctly, update on SSE events without flicker.

jobs.title: Job detail panel (right slide-in)
jobs.body:
**File: `detail-panel.js`** — Replace stubs with full implementation. Do NOT modify any other file.

Implement all exported functions:
- `initDetailPanel(opts)` — Set up panel container, close button, callbacks
- `openDetailPanel(job, allJobs, ctx)` — Populate and show the panel
- `closeDetailPanel()` — Hide with slide animation
- `fetchLinkedPR(job, ctx)` — Async-load PR from Forgejo API
- `updatePanelSessions(sessions)` — Update session controls if panel is open
- `notifySessionUpdate(data)` — Handle session state changes

**Panel content (360px wide, right slide-in):**
- Header: job title (h2) + close button
- Detail rows: ref `owner/repo/#N`, state badge (snake_case), priority, assignees (avatars), timeout
- Dependencies list: clickable, color-coded by state — click calls `window.__navigateToNode(depNum)`
- Dependents list: reverse deps, same behavior
- PR section (for in_review/changes_requested/done): fetch from `FORGEJO_URL + '/api/v1/repos/.../pulls'`, find `Closes #N`, show number + title + merge status. Cache per session.
- Session controls section (for on_the_stack/needs_help): attach/detach buttons, terminal links via `SIDECAR_URL`
- Activity timeline section: list activities with timestamps, status icons, links
- "Open in Forgejo" link at bottom using `FORGEJO_URL`

Use `SIDECAR_URL` and `FORGEJO_URL` constants from `window` (set by index.html).

**Verify:** Click a node widget → panel slides in with job details, deps are clickable, PR loads.

jobs.title: Repo selector dropdown with filter
jobs.body:
**File: `repo-selector.js`** — Replace stubs with full implementation. Do NOT modify any other file.

Implement all exported functions:
- `initRepoSelector({ onRepoChange })` — Create filter input + select dropdown in `#slot-repo-selector`
- `updateRepoSelector(allJobs)` — Extract unique `repo_owner/repo_name` combos with counts, rebuild options
- `getSelectedRepo()` — Return currently selected repo key or null

**Behavior:**
- `<select>` with `owner/repo (N jobs)` format options
- Text `<input>` filter — filters options as user types
- Auto-select: last non-test repo (skip repos containing `/test-`)
- On change: fire `onRepoChange` callback
- On repo change: fetch collaborator list from `SIDECAR_URL + '/repos/{owner}/{repo}/users'`

Use `SIDECAR_URL` constant from `window`.

**Verify:** Dropdown shows repos, filter works, selecting a repo re-renders the graph for that repo.

jobs.title: Worker roster strip below header
jobs.body:
**File: `roster-bar.js`** — Replace stubs with full implementation. Do NOT modify any other file.

Implement all exported functions:
- `initRosterBar(opts)` — Set up roster container with category groups
- `updateRosterState(workers, allJobs)` — Update worker counts, states, avatars
- `syncRoster(workers, jobs)` — Full sync on snapshot
- `highlightPinnedWorker(workerId)` — Highlight pinned worker's jobs
- `getPinnedWorker()` — Return pinned worker ID or null

**Layout:** Fixed below header (z-99), flex row with groups: Agents (dispatcher + workers + reviewer), Humans

**Worker avatars (34px circles):**
- Avatar URL: `FORGEJO_URL + '/user/avatar/{login}/34'`
- Border color: green=idle, blue=busy, amber=transitioning
- Claim count badge (top-right)
- Tooltip: name + state text

**Interactions:**
- Hover: highlight worker's active jobs in graph via `window.__highlightWorkerJobs(jobNumbers)`
- Click: pin/unpin highlight
- Click dispatcher/reviewer: call `window.__openJournalPanel()`

Use `FORGEJO_URL` constant from `window`.

**Verify:** Roster shows workers with correct avatars, states, badges. Hover highlights jobs.

jobs.title: Dispatcher journal panel (left slide-in)
jobs.body:
**File: `journal-panel.js`** — Replace stubs with full implementation. Do NOT modify any other file.

Implement all exported functions:
- `initJournalPanel()` — Set up panel container + close button
- `setJournalEntries(entries)` — Replace all entries (on snapshot)
- `prependJournalEntry(entry)` — Add new entry at top (on incremental)
- `openJournalPanel()` — Show with slide animation
- `closeJournalPanel()` — Hide with slide animation

**Panel (400px wide, left slide-in):**
- Header: "Dispatcher Journal" + close button
- Entries (reverse chronological, max 200):
  - Timestamp: HH:MM:SS local time
  - Action badge: color-coded pill (assign=blue, complete=green, fail=red, abandon=amber, etc.)
  - Comment text
  - Metadata: worker_id + `#N` (both may be null — handle gracefully)
- Empty state: "No actions yet"

**Verify:** Click dispatcher avatar → panel slides in with journal entries, new entries prepend in real-time.

jobs.title: New issue creation form (right slide-in panel)
jobs.body:
**File: `new-issue-panel.js`** — Replace stubs with full implementation. Do NOT modify any other file.

Implement all exported functions:
- `initNewIssuePanel(ctx)` — Set up form panel
- `openNewIssuePanel()` — Show with slide animation
- `closeNewIssuePanel()` — Hide with slide animation

**Form (420px wide, right slide-in):**
- Title (required): text input
- Body: textarea, min-height 120px
- Dependencies: text input for `#1, #2` format → appends `<!-- workflow:deps:1,2 -->` to body
- Initial state: radio — On-Ice (default) or On-Deck

**Submit:** POST `SIDECAR_URL + '/repos/{owner}/{repo}/issues'` with title, body, label IDs. Fetch label IDs first via `SIDECAR_URL + '/repos/{owner}/{repo}/labels'`.

Use `SIDECAR_URL` constant from `window`.

**Verify:** Click "+ New Issue" → form slides in, submit creates an issue in Forgejo.

jobs.title: Wire up cross-module interactions and verify end-to-end
jobs.body:
**Files: `index.html` (update wiring only), any module that needs cross-module calls.**

This ticket assembles the independently-developed modules into a working whole.

**Cross-module wiring via window globals (set in index.html):**
- `window.__cy` — Cytoscape instance (set by graph.js)
- `window.__onNodeClick(job)` — triggers graph highlight + opens detail panel
- `window.__navigateToNode(num)` — graph.js navigateToNode + open detail
- `window.__highlightWorkerJobs(nums)` — graph.js highlight
- `window.__openJournalPanel()` — journal-panel.js open
- `window.__repoContext` — { owner, repo } for detail panel links

**Verify each interaction:**
1. Click node widget → highlights neighbors + opens detail panel
2. Click dependency in detail → navigates to that node + opens its detail
3. Click background → clears highlights + closes detail
4. Hover roster worker → highlights their jobs
5. Click roster worker → pins highlight
6. Click dispatcher avatar → opens journal
7. Repo selector change → re-renders graph + roster
8. New issue form → creates issue, appears in graph on next SSE update
9. Session controls → attach/detach buttons work
10. Real-time updates → new jobs appear, state changes reflect immediately

**Fix any integration issues** — module APIs may need minor adjustments.

**Verify:** All interactions work end-to-end, no console errors.

jobs.title: Visual polish: animations, transitions, hover states
jobs.body:
**Files: `style.css` (refinements), any JS file needing animation tweaks.**

Final visual refinements after integration:

**Verify and fix:**
- Panel slide animations smooth (0.25s ease)
- Avatar hover: scale 1.15x + blue glow
- Link hover transitions
- Glassmorphism consistency across all panels
- Custom scrollbars (6px, dark track, gray thumb)
- Focus states (blue border on inputs)
- Empty states ("No jobs found", "No actions yet")
- Responsive legend wrapping
- No visual glitches during SSE updates
- `cargo fmt --check` and `cargo clippy` pass

**Verify:** All animations smooth, consistent dark theme, no visual regressions.
